footer.tagline: Safely transporting adopted dogs across Europe.

hero.title: Every dog deserves a
hero.subtitle: Safely transporting adopted dogs across Europe — connecting shelters with loving families, one paw at a time.

about.title: Born from a love for rescue dogs
about.p1: Lilia Paws Travel was founded by Lilia Pontika, a passionate animal welfare advocate. Through years of experience, she witnessed hundreds of dogs adopted across borders with no safe, humane transport solution.
about.p2: From a one-van operation to a network spanning 18 countries and 200+ shelters, we've safely transported over 1,200 dogs and counting.

safetyFirst.title: Safety First
safetyFirst.desc: Vet-approved health certificates and constant monitoring.

weCare.title: We Care Deeply
weCare.desc: Dogs are not cargo. Comfort stops and cuddles on every trip.

fullyLegal.title: Fully Legal
fullyLegal.desc: EU pet travel compliance — microchips, passports, documents handled.

shelterPartners.title: Shelter Partners
shelterPartners.desc: We work with 200+ certified shelters and verified adopters.

about.processSubtitle: Simple, transparent, stress-free — for you and your dog.

step4.title: Safe Delivery
step4.desc: Your dog arrives happy and healthy.

fleet.title: Built for safe, comfortable journeys
fleet.p1: Our climate-controlled van is specially outfitted for animal transport — spacious crates, ventilation, and hygiene protocols on every trip.
fleet.p2: Each vehicle is inspected and sanitised before departure, ensuring your dog travels in the safest and most comfortable conditions possible.

cta.title: Ready to bring your dog home?
cta.subtitle: Submit a transport request and we'll respond within 24 hours.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you
contact.heroSubtitle: Let's talk about your dog's journey home. We respond within 24 hours.

tripRequest.title: Book a Transport
tripRequest.subtitle: Select a travel date, fill in your details, add your dogs, and submit.
tripRequest.clickHint: Click a highlighted date to select a trip.
tripRequest.tripFullMsg: This trip is fully booked. Please select another date.
tripRequest.requestsClosedMsg: Requests for this trip are currently closed.
tripRequest.noTripHint: Select a highlighted date on the calendar above to start your booking.
tripRequest.sidebarStep1Desc: Select from available trips on the calendar
tripRequest.sidebarStep2Desc: Your info and your dog's details
tripRequest.sidebarStep4Desc: Your dog arrives happy and healthy
tripRequest.questionsDesc: Contact us directly and we'll help you book.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Born from a love for rescue dogs
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Many years on the road, thousands of dogs home — one loving journey at a time.
aboutPage.storyTitle: A mission that started with one van and a promise
aboutPage.storyP1: Lilia Paws Travel was founded by Lilia Pontika, a passionate animal welfare advocate. Through years of experience, she witnessed hundreds of dogs adopted across borders with no safe, humane transport solution.
aboutPage.storyP2: What began as voluntary dog transport quickly grew into a deep responsibility — to create a humane, safe, and reliable way of transporting animals that respects every life.
aboutPage.storyP3: Our responsibility is not simply transporting an animal to a new owner — it is carrying a soul to a new family. Transparency, safety, and humane treatment are our primary concern on every journey.
aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: Every decision we make — from route planning to rest stops — is guided by these principles.

safety.title: Safety Above All
safety.desc: Vet-approved health certificates, microchip verification, and continuous monitoring on every trip.

care.title: Genuine Care
care.desc: Comfort stops, food, water, and hygiene on every route. Dogs are never left unattended.

legal.title: Fully EU Compliant
legal.desc: We handle all paperwork — pet passports, health certificates, microchips, and TRACES certificates.

shelter.title: Shelter Partnerships
shelter.desc: We work exclusively with certified, ethical shelters, ensuring every adoption is verified and responsible.

vehicle.title: Climate-Controlled Vans & Direct Contact
vehicle.desc: Temperature-regulated, sanitised before every trip. Our drivers maintain direct access to the crates throughout the journey. Comfortable and safe for dogs of all sizes.

reach.title: Pan-European Reach
reach.desc: From Greece to Italy, Germany, France, and the Netherlands — we connect shelters with families across Europe.
